_comment: Tier-2 for febio linear_elasticity#: FEBio backend self-consistency gate. FEBio binary is not installed in this sandbox (no conda/pip/apt package; gated download from febio.org), so runtime verification against the input parser is unavailable. The fixture instead pins INTERNAL consistency: (a) every PhysicsCapability in supported_physics() has a matching _TEMPLATES['<physics>_<variant>'] entry — generate_input() must not raise ValueError for advertised physics × variants; (b) every PhysicsCapability has a _FEBIO_KNOWLEDGE['<physics>'] entry — get_knowledge() must not return {}; (c) every shipped template emits well-formed XML with <febio_spec version='4.0'> root; (d) every template's <Module type='X'> matches the physics-required module (solid for elasticity/hyperelasticity, biphasic for biphasic, heat for heat). Catalog falsifications #29 + #30: the previous backend advertised 4 physics but had 1 template + 2 knowledge entries — 3 ValueError paths + 2 empty-dict get_knowledge paths. Fix shipped alongside (3 template stubs + 2 knowledge entries). Verified 2026-06-01.
